---
name: Feature request
about: An improvement, new capability, or new integration you'd like to see
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What user journey does this improve?

One or two sentences. Examples:

- "I run WhatTheAgent in CI and want it to fail the build when a critical chain appears that wasn't acknowledged in policy."
- "I run Hermes on my phone and want the chat skill to also handle 'remind me later' as a reply."
- "I want to scan a Cursor workspace and have it pick up `.cursor/rules/*.md` automatically."

Tell us what gets better, not what code change you're picturing.

## What's the workaround today?

If any. Even "I can't do this at all" is useful information.

## Anything else

Links, screenshots, related issues.
